languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Губернатор Батошски{/d} удерживает святыню красных мантий на северо-востоке. Говорят, у него кончились патроны и он ломает ксенотварей голыми руками".

"{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Губернатор Батошски{/d} удерживает святыню красных мантий на северо-востоке. Говорят, у него кончились патроны и он ломает ксенотварей голыми руками".

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is in the north-east holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that doesn't stop him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."

"{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."
"Castellan-Governor Batoshski is in the north-east holding a cog distribution point for some kind of forces there."
"Governor Batoshski is in the north-east holding the red robes' chapel. They say he tore a creature's limbs off and is now carving up the ones coming at him with them."
"Governor Batoshski is in the north-east holding the red robes' chapel. They say he tore one of the creature's arms off and is now using them to carve up the others coming at him."

"{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is in the north-east holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that doesn't stop him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."

"{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."

"{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."

languages.text: 「バトシュスキー城代は北東で、何らかの部隊の歯車配給所を運営している」
languages.original_text: "Castellan-Governor Batoshski is in the north-east holding a cog distribution point for some kind of forces there."

traits.locale_text: 「バトシュスキー城代は北東で、何らかの部隊の歯車配給所を運営している」

languages.text: «El {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}gobernador Batoshski{/d} está al noreste defendiendo la capilla de los túnicas rojas. Dicen que se ha quedado sin munición, pero eso no le ha impedido destrozar a los xenomonstruos con sus propias manos».
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."

traits.locale_text: «El {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}gobernador Batoshski{/d} está al noreste defendiendo la capilla de los túnicas rojas. Dicen que se ha quedado sin munición, pero eso no le ha impedido destrozar a los xenomonstruos con sus propias manos».

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Gouverneur Batoshski{/d} hält im Nordosten die Kapelle der Roten Roben. Er hat wohl keine Munition mehr, aber das hat ihn nicht davon abgehalten, diese Xenoteufel mit bloßen Händen zu töten."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Gouverneur Batoshski{/d} hält im Nordosten die Kapelle der Roten Roben. Er hat wohl keine Munition mehr, aber das hat ihn nicht davon abgehalten, diese Xenoteufel mit bloßen Händen zu töten."

languages.text: « Le {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}gouverneur Batoshski{/d} est au nord-est, en train de défendre la chapelle des robes rouges. On raconte qu'il est à court de munitions, mais ça ne l'empêche pas de briser ces pourritures xénos en deux à mains nues. »
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."

traits.locale_text: « Le {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}gouverneur Batoshski{/d} est au nord-est, en train de défendre la chapelle des robes rouges. On raconte qu'il est à court de munitions, mais ça ne l'empêche pas de briser ces pourritures xénos en deux à mains nues. »

languages.text: “{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}巴托什斯基总督{/d}在东北方，把守着红袍们的圣堂。据说他的弹药已经耗尽，但这并不妨碍他徒手把那些异形杂种砸成肉泥。”
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."

traits.locale_text: “{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}巴托什斯基总督{/d}在东北方，把守着红袍们的圣堂。据说他的弹药已经耗尽，但这并不妨碍他徒手把那些异形杂种砸成肉泥。”

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Vali Batoshski{/d} kuzeydoğuda, kızıl cübbeli rahiplerin şapelini elinde tutuyor. Cephanesinin bittiğini söylüyorlar ama bu onu o zeno şeytanlarını çıplak elleriyle parçalamaktan alıkoymuyor."
languages.original_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_BatoshskiGovernor}Governor Batoshski{/d} is to the north-east, holding the red robes' chapel. They say he's run out of ammunition, but that hasn't stopped him from breaking those xenofiends with his bare hands."
